prompt: Build a hero card with title and body in a vertical stack.
openui:
root = Stack([hero], "column")
hero_title = TextContent(":hero.title")
hero_body = TextContent(":hero.body")
hero = Card([hero_title, hero_body])

prompt: Form-like stack with title text and submit button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, submit], "column")
title = TextContent(":form.title")
submit = Button(":form.submit")

root = Stack([left, right], "row", "m")
left_title = TextContent(":col.left.title")
left_body = TextContent(":col.left.body")
left = Card([left_title, left_body])
right_title = TextContent(":col.right.title")
right_body = TextContent(":col.right.body")
right = Card([right_title, right_body])

prompt: Use an unusually large gap between stacked cards.
openui:
root = Stack([a, b], "column", "2xl")
a_title = TextContent(":rare.a.title")
a_body = TextContent(":rare.a.body")
a = Card([a_title, a_body])
b_title = TextContent(":rare.b.title")
b_body = TextContent(":rare.b.body")
b = Card([b_title, b_body])

prompt: Dashboard-like layout with header text and two metric cards.
openui:
root = Stack([header, row], "column")
header = TextContent(":dash.header")
m1_title = TextContent(":dash.m1.title")
m1_body = TextContent(":dash.m1.body")
m1 = Card([m1_title, m1_body])
m2_title = TextContent(":dash.m2.title")
m2_body = TextContent(":dash.m2.body")
m2 = Card([m2_title, m2_body])
row = Stack([m1, m2], "row")

prompt: Login stack with email input and continue button.
openui:
root = Stack([email, continueBtn], "column", "m")
email = Input("email", ":login.email.placeholder")
continueBtn = Button(":login.continue")
